# Beauty with EVE - Comprehensive Business Details

## Overview
Beauty with EVE is a personal brand founded by Evelynn Koo, specializing in personal colour analysis and corporate image consulting. Based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, the business uses the 12-season colour analysis method to help individuals and organizations discover their natural colour palettes.

## About Evelynn Koo (Founder & Lead Analyst)
- **Certification**: Certified Personal Colour Analyst (trained under a South Korean expert).
- **Accreditation**: Senior Corporate Consultant — HRD Corp accredited Trainer (Train-the-Trainer certified).
- **Experience**: Empowered 200+ individuals through events and 1-on-1 sessions.
- **Current Role**: Head of Operation at déBeau Beauty Academy.
- **Expertise**: 12-season colour theory, fabric draping, corporate image consulting, professional styling, and colour psychology.

## Services & Pricing

### Individual Sessions
- **Signature Draping Session**
    - **Price**: From RM 450 per person.
    - **Duration**: 2 hours (1-on-1).
    - **Description**: Comprehensive session using 12-season luxury fabric drapes to discover unique sub-seasons.
    - **Includes**: In-depth colour theory, primary and sub-season analysis, premium digital palette guide, makeup/jewellery/hair recommendations, Personal Colour Card, and Consultation Report.

### Corporate & Group Programmes
- **Retail Events (Event Activation)**
    - **Price**: From RM 1,500 per session.
    - **Capacity**: Serves 15–30 guests per 4-hour session.
    - **Description**: Colour analysis activation for launches, exhibitions, or promotions.
    - **Includes**: 10–15 min consultations per guest, 1:1 analysis, product-matched recommendations, Personal Colour Cards, and post-event summary report.
    - **Logistics**: 1.5 x 1.5 m table space, natural/daylight-balanced lighting preferred.

- **Drape Party (Small Group)**
    - **Price**: From RM 1,200 per session.
    - **Capacity**: 4–12 guests.
    - **Duration**: 3–4 hours.
    - **Description**: Intimate group experience with colour theory presentation and individual draping.
    - **Includes**: Group colour summary, 1:1 draping for every guest, Personal Colour Cards.

- **Team Workshop (Large Group)**
    - **Price**: From RM 3,500 per session.
    - **Capacity**: 50–100 pax.
    - **Duration**: 3 hours.
    - **Status**: HRDC-Claimable.
    - **Includes**: Colour theory presentation (slides), live draping demo (1–2 pax), Personal Colour Self-check Kit per attendee, and full HRDC documentation (invoice, attendance sheet, certificate of completion).
    - **Requirements**: Projector, screen, and PA system (provided by organiser).

- **Corporate Consultation (Bespoke Advisory)**
    - **Price**: From RM 500.
    - **Duration**: 90 minutes.
    - **Description**: Strategy session for brand managers, event planners, and HR leads to profile audiences and recommend activation formats.
    - **Includes**: Custom activation brief document and pricing estimate.

## Event Portfolio & Clients
- **JD Sports** (Pavilion Kuala Lumpur, March 2026): Retail activation with activewear shade recommendations.
- **Shu Uemura** (Mid Valley Megamall, March 2026): Counter-side activation with foundation and makeup shade matching.
- **Other Collaborations**: Coach, 3CE, and various financial services and tech firms.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: What should I wear to my draping session?**
A: Wear neutral clothing with an open neckline. Avoid bulky layers. White is recommended to observe natural skin undertones closely.

**Q: Can I wear makeup to the session?**
A: No. Arrive with a completely bare face. Makeup (foundation, bronzer, etc.) alters your overtone and skews results.

**Q: How long does a personal colour analysis take?**
A: Approximately 90–120 minutes.

**Q: Do you offer group sessions or corporate events?**
A: Yes. Options include Retail Events, Drape Parties, and HRDC-claimable Team Workshops.

**Q: How many guests can you serve at a retail event?**
A: 15–30 guests per 4-hour session. A second analyst can be arranged for larger capacities.

**Q: Can you tie the colour analysis to our brand's products?**
A: Yes. Evelynn briefs herself on your range beforehand to provide matched recommendations. Co-branded cards are available.

**Q: How far in advance do I need to book?**
A: 1 week for individual sessions, 2 weeks for corporate events, and 3 weeks minimum for HRDC-claimable workshops.

## Contact & Logistics
- **Location**: Based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
- **Geographic Coverage**: All Klang Valley events at no travel cost. Penang, Johor, and other cities quoted separately.
- **Response Time**: Replies within one business day.
- **Email**: evelynnkoo@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://beautywitheve.com
- **Instagram**: @beautywitheve
